conversations.content: Create a new github repository named new_project, and invite all collaborators in emmajohnson/image_transformation as the collaborators.

<function_thought>
The first step is to create a new GitHub repository named "new_project". Once that is completed, I will retrieve the collaboration information from the repository "emmajohnson/image_transformation" to invite all collaborators to the newly created repository. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_create_repo(repo_name="new_project")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Please verify your account to proceed the repository creation. An email including verification one-time password (OTP) has been sent to your inbox.

<function_thought>
The repository "new_project" requires account verification via a one-time password (OTP) sent to the email inbox. I will now retrieve the unread emails to check for the OTP needed for the verification process. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_github_linked_unread_emails()]</function_call>

<function_thought>
I found the one-time password (OTP) for the repository creation in the unread emails: "Your github repository creation OTP is: 317970". I will now use this OTP to verify the account and proceed with the repository creation.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[verify_github_account(otp="317970")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The verification for the GitHub account has been successfully completed. Now I will proceed to retrieve the collaborators from the repository "emmajohnson/image_transformation" so that I can invite them to the newly created repository "new_project".
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_github_repository_information(repo_name="emmajohnson/image_transformation")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

- bob.olive@gmail.com

Now, I will invite these collaborators to the newly created repository "new_project".

<function_call>[

]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
It seems that the invitations to the collaborators to the repository "new_project" failed because the repository does not exist. I will attempt to create the repository again to ensure it is set up properly before inviting the collaborators.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_create_repo(repo_name="new_project")]</function_call>
